memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-05-12 — Mid-Morning — CPI +3.8%, Market-Open missed, AMD re-rejected

- **Market-Open silently failed** (no heartbeat). Mid-Morning ran catch-up. No MOO fills (both were API-blocked).
- **CPI ACTUAL: +3.8% YoY** (beat +3.7% est). Core +2.8%. Energy gasoline +28.4% YoY. S&P -0.7%, Nasdaq -1.2%.
- **AMD failed ATH:** AMD hit $458.80 intraday high then reversed -3.5%. Re-scored 6.83 (technical 4/10). Not entering.
- **PLTR re-scored 7.17** at $135.35 (better entry than pre-market $137). Limit bracket attempted — HTTP 403 again.
- **GLD surging on hot CPI** — gold inflation hedge thesis confirmed. Trail stop to $408.74 recommended.
- **XLE holding** above stop ($57.50 vs $56.15) — energy-driven CPI supports energy sector.
- **OPERATOR:** Place PLTR GTC bracket limit ($136.04/$119.71/$167.83, qty 36) + trail NVDA stop to $193.60 + trail GLD stop to $408.74.

### 2026-05-12 — Pre-Market — PLTR+AMD MOO blocked again

- PLTR MOO (36sh, 7.33) and AMD MOO (10sh, 7.33) attempted at 12:27Z — HTTP 403 again.

### 2026-05-08 — API blocked for 3rd consecutive routine

- AMD (7.33) and PLTR (7.33) MOO orders attempted at 12:19Z — HTTP 403.

### 2026-05-01 — Operator-mandated deployment bias correction

- Score ≥ 7 = enter at next routine. Only 3 valid skip exemptions.

market.macro_notes_md:
- **CPI ACTUAL (8:30 AM ET):** April headline +3.8% YoY (beat +3.7% est). Core +2.8% (beat +2.7%). Energy +3.8% MoM, gasoline +28.4% YoY. Market: S&P -0.7%, Nasdaq -1.2%. Rate hike prob ~30% by year-end. No Fed cuts until 2027.
- **China chip deal:** NVDA + AMD + AVGO agreed to 15% U.S. revenue share on China AI chip sales (H20, MI308 approved). AMD $500M-800M 2026 upside. NVDA $7-12.5B. Structural positive intact despite CPI selloff.
- **Trump-Xi Beijing summit (May 14-15):** Trade, AI chips, Taiwan, Iran on agenda. Semiconductor export controls key item. Upcoming catalyst for AMD, NVDA, TSM, AVGO.
- **Iran deal:** NOT confirmed. Senior Iranian official (Mohsen Rezaei) rebuffed U.S. deal proposal. Oil still $100-126/bbl. Energy CPI dominant inflation driver.
- **NVDA earnings May 21:** Q2 2026 report in 9 days. Stop at $175.60 provides 20% cushion from $220. Trail to $193.60 recommended. No new entries after May 19.
- **AMD:** Failed ATH attempt today ($458.80 high, reversed to $449). Re-scored 6.83 at mid-morning — below threshold. Trump-Xi summit May 14-15 could re-catalyze. Re-score in Daily Review.
